description: Well-maintained CAT 320D excavator with regular service history. Equipped with hydraulic quick coupler, auxiliary plumbing, and air conditioning. Machine is in good working condition and ready for international shipment.
Reliable Komatsu PC200-8 with low engine hours. Fully serviced with new filters and oils. Comes with standard arm and bucket, A/C, and ROPS cab.
Excellent condition Hitachi ZX210LC-5G. Long carriage model with great stability. Low hours, well-maintained by original owner. Includes quick coupler and spare bucket.
Well-maintained Kobelco SK200-8 with strong hydraulic performance. Comes with boom float, auxiliary lines, and air suspension seat. Ready for inspection.
Low-hour Doosan DX225LCA. Fuel-efficient with superior digging force. Features include rear camera, premium cab, and hydraulic quick coupler. Excellent investment.
Volvo EC210D with low hours. Known for fuel efficiency and operator comfort. Serviced regularly with genuine Volvo parts. Includes quick coupler and extra bucket.
Late-model Hyundai R220LC-9S with very low hours. Excellent condition with full service records. Equipped with hydraulic coupler, A/C, and sound-reduced cab.
Large CAT 330D excavator ideal for heavy earthmoving. Strong undercarriage and engine. Well-maintained with documented service history. Available for worldwide delivery.
Komatsu PC300-8 in good working order. Powerful machine suitable for mining and large construction projects. Regularly serviced, ready to work.
Premium Hitachi ZX350LC-5G with remarkably low hours. Large excavator in near-new condition. Full options including GPS, rear camera, and hydraulic coupler.
Kobelco SK350LC-8 with low hours. Excellent power-to-weight ratio. Well-maintained with no major repairs. Includes spare bucket set.
Near-new SANY SY215C with incredibly low hours. Modern machine with excellent fuel economy and strong resale value. Still under manufacturer warranty.
